nta.declaration: clock cl; int temp; const int a = 2003; const int b = 2088; const int c = 2110; const int d = 2126; const int e = 2139; const int f = 2150; const int g = 2161; const int h = 2171; const int i = 2180; const int j = 2189; const int k = 2198; const int l = 2207; const int m = 2216; const int n = 2226; const int o = 2237; const int p = 2248; const int q = 2261; const int r = 2277; const int s = 2299; const int t = 2384;
